__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — vendor datasheet, frozen citation

claim.condition: ASTM C39 cylinder, 28 d cure, 25 C; high end requires fiber + autoclave

source.secondary: Cor-Tuf datasheet (US Army Corps of Engineers spec) — up to ~800 MPa with steel fiber + heat treatment
source.citation: Ductal Premium Plus datasheet 2022 (Lafarge-Holcim) + Cor-Tuf data sheet 2018 (USACE ERDC) — UHPC sigma_c 150-200 MPa typical, 800 MPa upper headroom

tolerance.basis: vendor datasheet inter-batch variance ~ 15-20%; spec value accepted within ± 20%
